== Notes for [[Item:Q111208|Q111208]] ==

Citada em / cited in
https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Miro_(monarca)

--------------


* Not a known wife of https://www.geni.com/people/Sisebuto-rey-de-los-visigodos/6000000013762519362?through=6000000186248112832
* Not a known daughter of https://www.geni.com/people/Miro-king-of-the-Suevi/6000000186247181045?through=6000000186248112832
----

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
